summary: Iteration 72 - Regression Testing for Backend Refactoring. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified that analytics, subscription, promo code, and referral endpoints work correctly after extraction from server.py into /app/backend/routes/analytics_routes.py and /app/backend/routes/subscription_routes.py. SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS and check_feature_access correctly moved to /app/backend/core.py. Frontend PricingPage and FAQPage render correctly with accurate revenue share values (Free 20%, Rise 5%, Pro 0%).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns 3 plans (free, rise, pro) with correct revenue_share (20, 5, 0)
Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/my-plan returns current user's plan info
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview returns streams, earnings, release_count
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate returns 400 for empty code
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate returns 404 for invalid code
Backend: GET /api/admin/referral/overview returns data for admin
Backend: GET /api/analytics/release/{release_id} returns 404 for non-existent release
Frontend: Plan cards container found with data-testid='plan-cards'
Frontend: Free plan card found with data-testid='plan-free'
Frontend: Rise plan card found with data-testid='plan-rise'
Frontend: Pro plan card found with data-testid='plan-pro'
Frontend: Free plan shows 20% revenue share (users keep 80%)
Frontend: Rise plan shows 5% revenue share (users keep 95%) - correctly fixed from 10%
Frontend: Pro plan shows 0% revenue share (users keep 100%)
Frontend: Promo code section and input found
Frontend: FAQPage loads with title 'Frequently Asked Questions'
Frontend: FAQ section tabs found (7 sections)
Frontend: Free/Rise/Pro plan summary cards found on FAQ page
critical_code_review_comments: analytics_router and subscription_router correctly imported and included in server.py (lines 2086-2087, 2103-2104)
SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS correctly defined in core.py with revenue_share values: free=20, rise=5, pro=0
check_feature_access function correctly moved to core.py and validates plan-based feature access
All analytics endpoints (overview, trending, leaderboard, revenue, fan-analytics) working from analytics_routes.py
All subscription endpoints (plans, my-plan, checkout, upgrade) working from subscription_routes.py
All promo code endpoints (validate, admin CRUD) working from subscription_routes.py
All referral endpoints (my-link, stats, validate, complete, admin overview) working from subscription_routes.py
Goals CRUD endpoints (create, list, delete) working from analytics_routes.py
Revenue export endpoints (CSV, PDF) working from analytics_routes.py
PricingPage.jsx correctly displays Rise plan with 5% revenue share (not 10%)
FAQPage.jsx correctly displays subscription info with accurate revenue share values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified major backend refactoring: (1) analytics_routes.py contains all analytics, revenue, goals, fan-analytics, CSV import endpoints. (2) subscription_routes.py contains subscriptions, promo codes, referral endpoints. (3) SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS and check_feature_access moved to core.py. (4) server.py reduced from 3550 to 2258 lines. (5) All endpoints function identically after extraction. (6) PricingPage correctly shows Rise plan with 5% revenue share (fixed from 10%). (7) FAQPage displays accurate subscription info.

subscription_plans_endpoint.returns: 3 plans with correct revenue_share (free=20, rise=5, pro=0)

features: Rise plan shows 5% revenue share (correctly fixed)
